queries.question: Display field trips and study halls with 50 students.
queries.sql:
SELECT FieldTrips.trip as name
FROM FieldTrips
WHERE FieldTrips.number_of_students = 50
UNION
SELECT StudyHalls.building as name
FROM StudyHalls
WHERE StudyHalls.number_of_students = 50
